summary: Unit tests (ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1) are well-organized with good fixture design and cover core retention policies and dry-run logic. However, integration tests (Workflow.Tests.ps1) have critical flaws: (1) test cases reference fixture files (case1-max-age.json, case2-keep-latest.json, case3-dry-run-combined.json) that are not provided in the codebase; (2) tests assume the workflow reads `.ci-case.txt` with test parameters, but no code exists to implement this; (3) regex assertion `Should -Match 'ACTUALLY_DELETED=\s'` will not match the actual output format `ACTUALLY_DELETED=` with no trailing whitespace; (4) missing edge case testing (boundary ages, zero values, empty lists, conflicting policies). The test suite would fail immediately due to missing fixture files and untested workflow assumptions.
